summary: Phase 1.1 branding + UX polish testing complete. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All branding elements verified. One minor issue fixed (missing logo on rep home screen).
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend PATCH /api/leads/{id} supports both status and note updates (Phase 1.1 requirement)
✅ Manager dashboard status_breakdown reflects lead status changes correctly
✅ Brand logo (Grupa OZE) implemented via BrandLogo component using require() for native asset
✅ Theme colors updated to brand palette (blue #30A0E3, green #84D13C, navy #0B2545)
✅ Logo shown on all role screens: login, manager, rep (FIXED), admin
✅ Interactive donut drill-down working (click legend → shows filtered leads)
✅ Map pin drill-down working (click pin → shows lead details)
✅ Lead detail screen has status chips (all 5 statuses) with testIDs
✅ Lead detail screen has note textarea + save button with proper testIDs
✅ PDF generator uses branded template with logo data-URL (logoBase64.ts)
FIXED: Rep home screen was missing BrandLogo component - added topbar with logo (testID: rep-brand-logo)

success_rate.backend: 100% (24/24 tests passed, including 2 new Phase 1.1 tests)

seed_data_creation: Backend seed data already exists from iteration 1. No new seed data created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1.1 branding complete. All logos showing correctly across all role screens. Interactive drill-downs (donut + map) working. Lead detail status chips + note editing functional. Backend regression tests all passing. One minor fix applied: added BrandLogo to rep home screen topbar.

phase_1_1_new_tests.test_update_lead_note: ✅ PASSED - Handlowiec can update lead note via PATCH /api/leads/{id}
phase_1_1_new_tests.test_manager_dashboard_status_breakdown: ✅ PASSED - Manager dashboard status_breakdown reflects all 5 lead statuses correctly

regression_tests.auth_tests: ✅ ALL PASSED (5/5) - Login, auth/me working for all roles
regression_tests.settings_tests: ✅ ALL PASSED (3/3) - GET/PUT settings, admin-only access
regression_tests.dashboard_tests: ✅ ALL PASSED (3/3) - Manager + rep dashboards, role-based access
regression_tests.leads_tests: ✅ ALL PASSED (5/5) - GET leads, create, update status, update note, manager dashboard status_breakdown
regression_tests.users_tests: ✅ ALL PASSED (7/7) - Register, GET users, delete, role-based access

login_screen.quick_login_buttons: ✅ PASSED - All 3 buttons present (Admin, Manager, Handlowiec)

manager_dashboard.donut_drill_down: ✅ PASSED - Clicking legend 'decyzja' shows drill-down list with matching leads
manager_dashboard.lead_map: ✅ PASSED - Map component rendered (web fallback list)
manager_dashboard.map_pin_drill_down: ✅ PASSED - Clicking map pin shows drill-down list for that lead
manager_dashboard.drill_down_data: ✅ PASSED - Drill-down list shows client name, address, phone

rep_home.action_buttons: ✅ PASSED - Add lead, My leads buttons present

lead_detail.status_chips: ✅ PASSED - All 5 status chips present (nowy, umowione, decyzja, podpisana, nie_zainteresowany)
lead_detail.status_chip_click: ✅ PASSED - Clicking status chip triggers PATCH /api/leads/{id}
lead_detail.note_save: ✅ PASSED - Clicking save triggers PATCH /api/leads/{id} with note

admin_home.admin_tiles: ✅ PASSED - Settings and Users tiles present

pdf_generator_note: PDF generator template verified in code review (offerEngine.ts lines 207-209). Logo embedded as base64 data-URL. Branded template includes: header with logo, OFERTA HANDLOWA title, 7-column cost table, Gwarancja section with blue border, dark summary box, blue Eko-Abonament pill. End-to-end PDF generation test not performed (requires full offer flow with multiple steps).

notes.rep_logo_fix: Rep home screen was missing BrandLogo component. Added topbar with logo matching manager/admin layout. Fix verified after Expo restart.
notes.brand_colors: Theme colors correctly updated to Grupa OZE brand palette: primary blue #30A0E3, secondary green #84D13C, inverted navy #0B2545
notes.logo_asset: Logo asset exists at /app/frontend/assets/brand/logo.png (12.5KB). BrandLogo component uses require() for native compatibility.
notes.drill_down_functionality: Both donut legend and map pin drill-downs working correctly. Drill-down list shows client name, address, phone as required.
notes.status_chips: All 5 status chips render with correct testIDs (status-chip-{status}). Clicking chips triggers PATCH API call.
notes.note_editing: Note textarea and save button have correct testIDs. Save triggers PATCH /api/leads/{id} with note field.
notes.backend_regression: All 22 original tests + 2 new Phase 1.1 tests passing. No regressions detected.
